final_answer:
Yes, I read the code. Exact answer:

- **Initial token holder list:** currently **6 wallets** in [init_holders.js](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/scripts/init_holders.js#L1).
- **Validator list:** currently **1 validator wallet entry** in [validators.js](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/scripts/validators.js#L5).
- **Live roughnet flow script:** expects **5 wallets** (indexes 0..4) in [live-roughnet-gold-flow.js](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/scripts/live-roughnet-gold-flow.js#L15).

Important:
- The generator itself has **no fixed max**; it accepts a comma-separated list of any length for init holders in [generate.py](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/scripts/generate.py#L478).
- So “how many” depends on what testnet shape you want.  
- If you use repo defaults right now: **6 holder wallets + 1 validator entry + 5 operational test wallets**.
